bio.paragraph1: I enjoy understanding how systems work, from frontend interfaces to APIs, data, infrastructure, and the workflows connecting everything together.
bio.paragraph2: I enjoy designing user interfaces just as much as structuring backend services, instrumenting applications, or automating environments.
bio.paragraph3: When I am not coding, I am probably analyzing an architecture, documenting an idea, optimizing a workflow… or starting a new side project just to experiment with something.

description: Evaluated multiple analytics solutions and contributed to the selection and self-hosted deployment on virtual infrastructure using Docker.
Designed and integrated an instrumentation system within a SaaS application (Angular, Express.js) to measure feature usage and user behavior.
Developed backend API mechanisms for analytics event collection, centralization, and enrichment.
Designed dashboards to visualize usage metrics and support product analysis and decision-making.
Wrote and maintained end-to-end automated tests with Cypress to validate the correct triggering of tracking events.
Monitored service quality and KPI metrics in real time across fixed switching, microwave transmission, and backhaul networks.
Identified risk situations and coordinated action plans to reduce incidents and improve network availability.
Analyzed network traffic, balanced links, and contributed to routing optimization.
Participated in the supervision and performance maintenance of critical network infrastructures.
Produced monitoring reports and collaborated with technical teams to ensure service stability and continuity.

kafkaEventPlatform.title: Kafka Event Processing Platform
kafkaEventPlatform.shortDescription: Event-driven backend platform using Kafka, Spring Boot, and Docker for asynchronous transaction processing.
kafkaEventPlatform.longDescription: Designed and developed an event-driven backend platform based on Apache Kafka and Spring Boot for asynchronous transaction publishing, processing, and monitoring.
kafkaEventPlatform.imageAlt: Architecture of the Kafka Event Processing Platform
